---
title: 'Dear Her... A Scary Thought...'
date: '2020-04-04T06:35:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '485602721396270100'
blogger_filename: '/2020/04/dear-her-scary-thought.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Dear Her'
---

<div class="WordSection1">  <p class="MsoNormal">Dear Her,</p><p class="MsoNormal">This wasn't really written "TO" you, but since it was about you, I decided to include it.&nbsp;</p><p class="MsoNormal"><br /></p><p class="MsoNormal"><i>This conversation just gave me a REALLY scary thought.<o:p></o:p></i></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><i>What if my future wife and kids have a large extended family, property, and roots here and they adopt us into the family we never had…&nbsp;  <o:p></o:p></i></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><i>I always liked the idea of someone just as detached from their family as I am, that way I don't have to live up to (or fail) their families expectations (or pass their judgment)...  <o:p></o:p></i></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><i>What if... I'm finally growing up enough that they won't just accept me but love me, and I'll get the family I never had in the deal...  <o:p></o:p></i></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><i>That's a terrifying thought<o:p></o:p></i></p>  <p class="MsoNormal"><o:p>&nbsp;</o:p></p></div>
